choose.when:
<set-variable name="ddPhase3" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase3Response"]).Body.As())" />

      
      
        
          
            <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["block"]["status"].Value())" />
            
              @{
                var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["block"]["headers"];
                if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
                  return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
                }
                return "application/json";
              }
            
            @{
              var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["block"]["content"];
              if (content != null) {
                return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
              }
              return "";
            }
          
        
      

      
      
        
          
            https://:8080/
            POST
            
              application/json
            
            @{
              var maxSize = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["allowed-body-size"].Value();
              var body = context.Response.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
              var b64 = "";
              if (body != null && body.Length > 0) {
                var slice = body.Length > maxSize ? body.Take(maxSize).ToArray() : body;
                b64 = Convert.ToBase64String(slice);
              }
              var addresses = new JObject(new JProperty("body", b64));
              return new JObject(
                new JProperty("addresses", addresses),
                new JProperty("request-id", context.Variables.ContainsKey("ddRequestId") ? (string)context.Variables["ddRequestId"] : ""),
                new JProperty("phase", "")
              ).ToString();
            }
          

          
            
              <set-variable name="ddPhase4" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase4Response"]).Body.As())" />
              
                
                  
                    <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase4"])["block"]["status"].Value())" />
                    
                      @{
                        var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase4"])["block"]["headers"];
                        if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
                          return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
                        }
                        return "application/json";
                      }
                    
                    @{
                      var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase4"])["block"]["content"];
                      if (content != null) {
                        return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
                      }
                      return "";
                    }
